claim: YOLO demand evidence dispatch API/schema supports research/fetch style evidence with external scope declaration, separating external research from target-project facts.

evidence.summary: Agent prompt explicitly instructs: 'If the demand explicitly asks for external research/fetch/search, actually use WebFetch/WebSearch when available and record those records as scope=external'
evidence.why: Proves external research support is built into agent instructions

evidence.summary: DEMAND_EVIDENCE_RESULT_SCHEMA_DEFINITION states: 'evidence: Array of { path?, url?, line?, scope, source, summary, why } records. scope is project | external | user | unknown'
evidence.why: Proves schema has explicit scope field with four valid values

evidence.summary: VALID_EVIDENCE_SCOPES defined as Set containing [project, external, user, unknown]
evidence.why: Proves only four scope values are accepted

evidence.summary: evidenceRecordScope() function classifies records: explicit scope field, URLs starting with http/https as external, source types like external_web/webfetch/websearch as external
evidence.why: Proves scope inference logic distinguishes external web sources from project files

evidence.summary: projectEvidenceBlockingIssues() blocks claims that lack project-scoped evidence with concrete path locators
evidence.why: Proves target-project facts require project-scoped evidence, external-only evidence becomes blocker

evidence.summary: Doctrine states: evidence records must declare scope; project evidence from code/tests/docs/config/logs/artifacts requires repo-relative path; external evidence from WebFetch/WebSearch only supports background research
evidence.why: Proves doctrinal contract separates external research from project facts

evidence.summary: VALID_EVIDENCE_SCOPES declared in dispatch module matching router values
evidenceScopeErrors() validates that every evidence record declares valid scope, blocking invalid scope declarations
evidence.why: Proves runtime enforcement of scope requirement

risks: If external research tools are misconfigured or unavailable, agents may fail to gather external evidence

result.notes: The claim is verified: evidence-dispatch.ts, router.ts, and doctrine all confirm support for external research with scope=external, separated from project-scoped facts requiring path evidence.
